requirement_topic.en: DOE Energy Performance and MEPS for Lighting (Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act / DOE labelling)
requirement_topic.zh: DOE 照明能效性能及 MEPS（能源效率与节约法 / DOE 能效标签）
requirement_topic.zht: DOE 照明能效性能及 MEPS（能源效率與節約法 / DOE 能效標籤）

summary.en: In the Philippines, the Department of Energy (DOE) administers minimum energy performance and energy labelling for lighting products under the Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act (Republic Act No. 11285) and its implementing rules, building on the earlier Philippine Energy Labeling Program. Self-ballasted LED lamps and certain LED luminaires must carry the yellow Philippine Energy Label declaring luminous efficacy (lm/W), wattage, luminous flux, correlated colour temperature, and rated life, and must meet the applicable Minimum Energy Performance Standard (MEPS) where one is set for the product class. Performance is tested to the relevant PNS IEC photometric and performance standards (e.g. PNS IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamps). Products below the MEPS floor or without a valid energy label cannot be lawfully distributed. Note: rated voltage/frequency is the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply, so photometric and energy figures must be declared for 230 V 60 Hz operation.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾，能源部（DOE）依据《能源效率与节约法》（共和国第 11285 号法）及其实施细则，并以早先的菲律宾能效标识计划为基础，负责照明产品的最低能效性能及能效标签。自镇流 LED 灯及部分 LED 灯具须贴附黄色菲律宾能效标签，标注光效（lm/W）、功率、光通量、相关色温及额定寿命，并在所属产品类别已设定时满足适用的最低能效性能标准（MEPS）。性能依据相关 PNS IEC 光度及性能标准检测（如自镇流 LED 灯适用 PNS IEC 62612）。低于 MEPS 下限或无有效能效标签的产品不得合法分销。注意：额定电压/频率为菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电，因此光度及能效数据须按 230 V 60 Hz 运行条件声明。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓，能源部（DOE）依據《能源效率與節約法》（共和國第 11285 號法）及其實施細則，並以早先的菲律賓能效標識計劃為基礎，負責照明產品的最低能效性能及能效標籤。自鎮流 LED 燈及部分 LED 燈具須貼附黃色菲律賓能效標籤，標註光效（lm/W）、功率、光通量、相關色溫及額定壽命，並在所屬產品類別已設定時滿足適用的最低能效性能標準（MEPS）。性能依據相關 PNS IEC 光度及性能標準檢測（如自鎮流 LED 燈適用 PNS IEC 62612）。低於 MEPS 下限或無有效能效標籤的產品不得合法分銷。注意：額定電壓/頻率為菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電，因此光度及能效數據須按 230 V 60 Hz 運行條件聲明。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 11285 — Energy Efficiency and Conservation Act (DOE energy labelling and MEPS framework)
Philippine Energy Labeling Program (PELP) — DOE energy label for lighting products
PNS IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (as adopted in the Philippines)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires), which sets three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest) approx. greater than or equal to 90 lm/W, Grade 2 approx. greater than or equal to 80 lm/W, Grade 3 approx. greater than or equal to 70 lm/W, with Grade 3 the minimum for China market entry. The China Energy Label (CEL) is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products and is registered with CQC / CECP and administered by SAMR. Chinese energy figures are declared for the 220 V 50 Hz supply. The China Energy Label and the Philippine DOE energy label are separate, non-mutual schemes.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）约 大于等于 90 lm/W、2 级约 大于等于 80 lm/W、3 级约 大于等于 70 lm/W，其中 3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，向 CQC / CECP 注册并由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。中国能效数据按 220 V 50 Hz 供电声明。中国能效标识与菲律宾 DOE 能效标签为相互独立、不互认的方案。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）約 大於等於 90 lm/W、2 級約 大於等於 80 lm/W、3 級約 大於等於 70 lm/W，其中 3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，向 CQC / CECP 註冊並由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。中國能效數據按 220 V 50 Hz 供電聲明。中國能效標識與菲律賓 DOE 能效標籤為相互獨立、不互認的方案。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR / CQC / CECP

gap.en: The Philippine DOE energy label and any applicable MEPS are a separate pre-market obligation with no mutual recognition of the China Energy Label — a product must be tested and the yellow DOE label declared for the Philippine market regardless of its China grade. Because Philippine ratings are referenced to 230 V 60 Hz while China figures are referenced to 220 V 50 Hz, luminous efficacy, power, and flux must be re-declared (and may differ) under Philippine supply conditions. Manufacturers achieving only China Grade 3 (approx. 70 lm/W) should confirm whether the product clears the applicable Philippine MEPS floor for its class. Performance test reports must be to the PNS-adopted IEC performance standard (e.g. PNS IEC 62612), and the energy label artwork and declared values must follow the DOE format rather than the China CEL format.
gap.zh: 菲律宾 DOE 能效标签及适用 MEPS 是独立的上市前义务，与中国能效标识不存在互认——无论产品的中国等级如何，均须为菲律宾市场进行检测并声明黄色 DOE 标签。由于菲律宾参数以 230 V 60 Hz 为基准，而中国数据以 220 V 50 Hz 为基准，光效、功率及光通量须按菲律宾供电条件重新声明（且可能不同）。仅达到中国 3 级（约 70 lm/W）的制造商应确认产品是否满足其所属类别适用的菲律宾 MEPS 下限。性能检测报告须依据 PNS 采用的 IEC 性能标准（如 PNS IEC 62612），能效标签设计及声明值须遵循 DOE 格式而非中国 CEL 格式。
gap.zht: 菲律賓 DOE 能效標籤及適用 MEPS 是獨立的上市前義務，與中國能效標識不存在互認——無論產品的中國等級如何，均須為菲律賓市場進行檢測並聲明黃色 DOE 標籤。由於菲律賓參數以 230 V 60 Hz 為基準，而中國數據以 220 V 50 Hz 為基準，光效、功率及光通量須按菲律賓供電條件重新聲明（且可能不同）。僅達到中國 3 級（約 70 lm/W）的製造商應確認產品是否滿足其所屬類別適用的菲律賓 MEPS 下限。性能檢測報告須依據 PNS 採用的 IEC 性能標準（如 PNS IEC 62612），能效標籤設計及聲明值須遵循 DOE 格式而非中國 CEL 格式。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where applicable — DOE energy label required for covered lighting products under RA 11285 / PELP; products in classes with a set MEPS must meet the minimum to be distributed
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (approx. 70 lm/W) is the minimum for China market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Department of Energy (DOE), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED lamps and luminaires for the Philippine market generally require a DOE energy label and, where a MEPS is set for the product class, must meet that minimum under RA 11285 and the Philippine Energy Labeling Program. The China Energy Label does not substitute for the DOE label, and energy/photometric values must be declared for the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine supply rather than China 220 V 50 Hz. Confirm the current MEPS floor and the applicable PNS IEC performance standard (e.g. PNS IEC 62612) for the specific product class before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向菲律宾市场的 LED 灯及灯具通常须取得 DOE 能效标签，且在产品类别已设定 MEPS 时，须依据 RA 11285 及菲律宾能效标识计划满足该最低要求。中国能效标识不可替代 DOE 标签，能效/光度数据须按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电而非中国 220 V 50 Hz 声明。进入市场前，请确认具体产品类别现行的 MEPS 下限及适用的 PNS IEC 性能标准（如 PNS IEC 62612）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向菲律賓市場的 LED 燈及燈具通常須取得 DOE 能效標籤，且在產品類別已設定 MEPS 時，須依據 RA 11285 及菲律賓能效標識計劃滿足該最低要求。中國能效標識不可替代 DOE 標籤，能效/光度數據須按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電而非中國 220 V 50 Hz 聲明。進入市場前，請確認具體產品類別現行的 MEPS 下限及適用的 PNS IEC 性能標準（如 PNS IEC 62612）。

requirement_topic.en: 230 V 60 Hz Grid Design and Voltage/Frequency Compatibility vs China 220/380 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 230 V 60 Hz 电网设计及电压/频率兼容性 vs 中国 220/380 V 50 Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 230 V 60 Hz 電網設計及電壓/頻率兼容性 vs 中國 220/380 V 50 Hz

summary.en: The Philippine low-voltage distribution supply is nominally 230 V at 60 Hz (single phase), differing from China's 220 V 50 Hz single phase and 380 V 50 Hz three phase. LED luminaires and their drivers placed on the Philippine market must be rated and verified for 230 V 60 Hz operation: the driver input voltage range must cover the Philippine nominal and its tolerance band, and performance, thermal behaviour, flicker, and any frequency-sensitive control circuitry must be validated at 60 Hz. The rating plate must declare the Philippine voltage/frequency, and DOE energy-label and PNS performance figures must reflect 230 V 60 Hz operation. Plug/socket and wiring practice also follows Philippine conventions rather than Chinese ones.
summary.zh: 菲律宾低压配电供电标称为 230 V、60 Hz（单相），不同于中国的 220 V 50 Hz 单相及 380 V 50 Hz 三相。投放菲律宾市场的 LED 灯具及其驱动器须按 230 V 60 Hz 运行进行额定及验证：驱动器输入电压范围须覆盖菲律宾标称值及其容差带，性能、热特性、闪烁以及任何对频率敏感的控制电路均须在 60 Hz 下验证。铭牌须标注菲律宾电压/频率，DOE 能效标签及 PNS 性能数据须反映 230 V 60 Hz 运行。插头/插座及布线做法亦遵循菲律宾惯例而非中国惯例。
summary.zht: 菲律賓低壓配電供電標稱為 230 V、60 Hz（單相），不同於中國的 220 V 50 Hz 單相及 380 V 50 Hz 三相。投放菲律賓市場的 LED 燈具及其驅動器須按 230 V 60 Hz 運行進行額定及驗證：驅動器輸入電壓範圍須覆蓋菲律賓標稱值及其容差帶，性能、熱特性、閃爍以及任何對頻率敏感的控制電路均須在 60 Hz 下驗證。銘牌須標註菲律賓電壓/頻率，DOE 能效標籤及 PNS 性能數據須反映 230 V 60 Hz 運行。插頭/插座及布線做法亦遵循菲律賓慣例而非中國慣例。

standards_or_laws: Philippine Electrical Code (PEC) — installation and supply conventions (230 V, 60 Hz nominal)
PNS IEC 60598-1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (rated voltage/frequency declaration, as adopted in the Philippines)

summary.en: China's domestic supply is 220 V 50 Hz single phase (380 V 50 Hz three phase for larger loads), and Chinese luminaires, drivers, and their GB-standard test reports (e.g. GB 19510.14 for LED control gear, GB/T 7000.1 for luminaires) are validated at 220 V 50 Hz. A China-spec rating plate and CCC documentation reflect 220 V 50 Hz operation. Although many wide-input LED drivers (e.g. 100 to 240 V, 50/60 Hz) physically tolerate the Philippine supply, the declared ratings, test reports, and energy figures are referenced to the Chinese supply unless re-declared.
summary.zh: 中国民用供电为 220 V 50 Hz 单相（较大负载为 380 V 50 Hz 三相），中国灯具、驱动器及其 GB 标准检测报告（如 LED 控制装置 GB 19510.14、灯具 GB/T 7000.1）均按 220 V 50 Hz 验证。中国规格铭牌及 CCC 文件反映 220 V 50 Hz 运行。尽管许多宽输入 LED 驱动器（如 100 至 240 V、50/60 Hz）在物理上可承受菲律宾供电，但除非重新声明，其声明额定值、检测报告及能效数据仍以中国供电为基准。
summary.zht: 中國民用供電為 220 V 50 Hz 單相（較大負載為 380 V 50 Hz 三相），中國燈具、驅動器及其 GB 標準檢測報告（如 LED 控制裝置 GB 19510.14、燈具 GB/T 7000.1）均按 220 V 50 Hz 驗證。中國規格銘牌及 CCC 文件反映 220 V 50 Hz 運行。儘管許多寬輸入 LED 驅動器（如 100 至 240 V、50/60 Hz）在物理上可承受菲律賓供電，但除非重新聲明，其聲明額定值、檢測報告及能效數據仍以中國供電為基準。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 7000.1 — Luminaires — Part 1: General requirements and tests (China, 220 V 50 Hz reference)
GB 19510.14-2014 — Control gear for lamps — Particular requirements for electronic controlgear for LED modules (China)

gap.en: The Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply differs from China 220/380 V 50 Hz in both voltage and frequency. Even where a wide-input driver physically operates on both, the Philippine rating plate, ICC/PS test reports, DOE energy label, and PNS performance figures must be declared and verified for 230 V 60 Hz — China 220 V 50 Hz test reports are not directly transferable. Frequency-sensitive items (e.g. some flicker / control behaviour, any 50 Hz-tuned magnetic components) should be re-validated at 60 Hz. Manufacturers should confirm the driver input window covers the Philippine nominal plus tolerance, declare the correct voltage/frequency on the rating plate, and ensure photometric and energy figures used for the DOE label and PNS reports correspond to 230 V 60 Hz operation. Plug, terminal, and installation conventions follow the Philippine Electrical Code rather than Chinese practice.
gap.zh: 菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 供电在电压和频率上均不同于中国 220/380 V 50 Hz。即便宽输入驱动器在两者下均可物理运行，菲律宾铭牌、ICC/PS 检测报告、DOE 能效标签及 PNS 性能数据均须按 230 V 60 Hz 声明并验证——中国 220 V 50 Hz 检测报告不可直接转用。对频率敏感的项目（如部分闪烁/控制行为、任何按 50 Hz 调校的磁性元件）应在 60 Hz 下重新验证。制造商应确认驱动器输入范围覆盖菲律宾标称值加容差，在铭牌上声明正确的电压/频率，并确保用于 DOE 标签及 PNS 报告的光度及能效数据对应 230 V 60 Hz 运行。插头、端子及安装惯例遵循菲律宾电气规范而非中国做法。
gap.zht: 菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 供電在電壓和頻率上均不同於中國 220/380 V 50 Hz。即便寬輸入驅動器在兩者下均可物理運行，菲律賓銘牌、ICC/PS 檢測報告、DOE 能效標籤及 PNS 性能數據均須按 230 V 60 Hz 聲明並驗證——中國 220 V 50 Hz 檢測報告不可直接轉用。對頻率敏感的項目（如部分閃爍/控制行為、任何按 50 Hz 調校的磁性元件）應在 60 Hz 下重新驗證。製造商應確認驅動器輸入範圍覆蓋菲律賓標稱值加容差，在銘牌上聲明正確的電壓/頻率，並確保用於 DOE 標籤及 PNS 報告的光度及能效數據對應 230 V 60 Hz 運行。插頭、端子及安裝慣例遵循菲律賓電氣規範而非中國做法。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products must be rated and declared for the Philippine 230 V 60 Hz supply; rating plate and ICC/PS, DOE, and PNS documentation must reflect Philippine voltage/frequency
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China products rated and tested for 220 V 50 Hz (single phase) / 380 V 50 Hz (three phase) under GB standards and CCC

source.publisher: Department of Energy (DOE), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Philippine grid is 230 V 60 Hz, differing from China 220/380 V 50 Hz in both voltage and frequency. LED luminaires and drivers for the Philippines must be rated, tested, and labelled for 230 V 60 Hz: a wide-input driver may physically work on both grids, but the rating plate, ICC/PS test reports, DOE energy label, and PNS performance figures must correspond to Philippine supply conditions and cannot simply reuse China 220 V 50 Hz documentation. Re-validate frequency-sensitive behaviour at 60 Hz before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾电网为 230 V 60 Hz，在电压和频率上均不同于中国 220/380 V 50 Hz。面向菲律宾的 LED 灯具及驱动器须按 230 V 60 Hz 进行额定、检测及标识：宽输入驱动器虽可在两种电网上物理运行，但铭牌、ICC/PS 检测报告、DOE 能效标签及 PNS 性能数据须对应菲律宾供电条件，不可简单沿用中国 220 V 50 Hz 文件。进入市场前，请在 60 Hz 下重新验证对频率敏感的行为。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓電網為 230 V 60 Hz，在電壓和頻率上均不同於中國 220/380 V 50 Hz。面向菲律賓的 LED 燈具及驅動器須按 230 V 60 Hz 進行額定、檢測及標識：寬輸入驅動器雖可在兩種電網上物理運行，但銘牌、ICC/PS 檢測報告、DOE 能效標籤及 PNS 性能數據須對應菲律賓供電條件，不可簡單沿用中國 220 V 50 Hz 文件。進入市場前，請在 60 Hz 下重新驗證對頻率敏感的行為。
